{{Infobox character
| name = Alagaeus
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Regent of the East]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, fourth Regent}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|shaper of deserts, builder of cities}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]]
}}

''See also: [[Alagaeus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Alagaeus was the [[Regent of the East]] and served as the second human to occupy the throne of the [[Aurelian Empire]]. A powerful figure, he was known as a builder of cities and a shaper of deserts who played a role in burying the [[Great Elders]]. He possessed unique abilities, including the capacity to read the intentions of entire cities and a connection to the [[Heart]] of the Earth that allowed him to channel his rage through a [[Vessel]] to cause seismic tremors. Despite his immense power and historical significance, he was assassinated by a peasant. While official reports initially claimed he was alive and recovering under the direction of [[Regent]] [[Loreli]], his death was eventually confirmed. Following his passing, his title was assumed by [[Shera]] [[Gardener]].}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Alagaeus]] was the [[Regent of the East]] and was assassinated.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Alagaeus]] was assassinated.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Alagaeus]] is dead.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Alagaeus is a [[Soulbound]] who has lived for approximately one hundred years and serves as the [[Regent of the East]]. Known as a shaper of deserts and a builder of cities, Alagaeus holds the belief that power grants an individual the right to make choices. After [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] began calling himself as such, Alagaeus joined the group. While their ultimate [[fate]] remains uncertain, it is possible that Alagaeus survived.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus]] is the [[Regent of the East]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus]] has lived for approximately one hundred years.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus]] is a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus]] is the shaper of deserts and builder of cities.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus]] believed that power gives one the right to make choices.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus]] is a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c4">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|It is possible for [[Alagaeus]] to have survived.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Alagaeus]] joined the group after [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]] began calling himself [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c9">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Alagaeus]] possesses a bronze staff.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A short and squat [[Heartlander]], Alagaeus is known as the fourth [[Regent]] and once served as the [[Soulbound]] to the [[Heart]] of the Earth. After participating in the burial of [[Othaghor]], he carried an [[emerald]]-topped staff that he would occasionally grind against docks in a sneer. Though his talent is comparable to [[Loreli]]'s and he once possessed a candlewick, there are fears that he may burn everything built to the ground. Ultimately, his identity was erased and replaced with the name [[Shera]] [[Gardener]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]] is likely to burn everything built to the ground.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c3">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]] was the [[Soulbound]] to the [[Heart]] of the Earth.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]] was one of those who buried [[Othaghor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A candlewick once belonged to [[Alagaeus]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]] is a person [[Loreli]] has talent comparable to.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]] is a short, squat [[Heartlander]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]] is referred to as the fourth [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]] is described as squat with an [[emerald]]-topped staff.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]] sneered and ground his staff against the dock.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Alagaeus]]'s name was erased and replaced with [[Shera]] [[Gardener]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|"I thought that was the point of assassinating Alagaeus," Calder said.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
